title: 人口问题
subtitle: Population Issues, Demographics, Aging Society
assistant_message: Learn to discuss population trends, express opinions on demographic challenges, and talk about social implications.

examples.chinese: 随着人口老龄化加剧，养老问题日益突出。
examples.translation: Along with the intensification of population aging, elderly care issues become increasingly prominent.
examples.translation_id: Seiring dengan intensifikasi penuaan populasi, masalah perawatan lansia menjadi semakin menonjol.

examples.chinese: 人口问题不仅影响经济发展，而且影响社会稳定。
examples.translation: Population issues not only affect economic development but also social stability.
examples.translation_id: Masalah populasi tidak hanya mempengaruhi pembangunan ekonomi tetapi juga stabilitas sosial.

grammar.point: Using 换句话说 (huàn jù huà shuō)

examples.chinese: 出生率持续下降，换句话说，劳动力将面临短缺。
examples.translation: The birth rate continues to decline; in other words, the labor force will face a shortage.
examples.translation_id: Angka kelahiran terus menurun; dengan kata lain, tenaga kerja akan menghadapi kekurangan.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Chen Wei
dialogue.chinese: 随着人口老龄化加剧，养老问题日益突出。
dialogue.pinyin: Suízhe rénkǒu lǎolínghuà jiājù, yǎnglǎo wèntí rìyì tūchū.
dialogue.translation: Along with the intensification of population aging, elderly care issues become increasingly prominent.
dialogue.translation_id: Seiring dengan intensifikasi penuaan populasi, masalah perawatan lansia menjadi semakin menonjol.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhao Lin
dialogue.chinese: 出生率持续下降，换句话说，劳动力将面临短缺。
dialogue.pinyin: Chūshēng lǜ chíxù xiàjiàng, huàn jù huà shuō, láodònglì jiāng miànlín duǎnquē.
dialogue.translation: The birth rate continues to decline; in other words, the labor force will face a shortage.
dialogue.translation_id: Angka kelahiran terus menurun; dengan kata lain, tenaga kerja akan menghadapi kekurangan.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Chen Wei
dialogue.chinese: 人口问题不仅影响经济发展，而且影响社会稳定。
dialogue.pinyin: Rénkǒu wèntí bùjǐn yǐngxiǎng jīngjì fāzhǎn, érqiě yǐngxiǎng shèhuì wěndìng.
dialogue.translation: Population issues not only affect economic development but also social stability.
dialogue.translation_id: Masalah populasi tidak hanya mempengaruhi pembangunan ekonomi tetapi juga stabilitas sosial.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhao Lin
dialogue.chinese: 我们需要完善养老体系，同时鼓励生育。这样才能应对人口挑战。
dialogue.pinyin: Wǒmen xūyào wánshàn yǎnglǎo tǐxì, tóngshí gǔlì shēngyù. Zhèyàng cáinéng yìngduì rénkǒu tiǎozhàn.
dialogue.translation: We need to improve the elderly care system while encouraging childbirth. Only then can we meet the population challenges.
dialogue.translation_id: Kita perlu meningkatkan sistem perawatan lansia sambil mendorong kelahiran. Hanya dengan begitu kita dapat menghadapi tantangan populasi.

exercises.question: How to say 'birth rate' in Chinese?
Complete: 出生率持续下降，______，劳动力将面临短缺。
